caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up, wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt, speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. She is positioned in front of a white wall featuring a black panel with yellow borders. To her left is a screen displaying the word "ohnson" in red text. Overlaid on the footage is a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST", alongside smaller text that says "By 11 Logo Studio". In the background, a sign reads "Employees Only". As the scene progresses, the woman is captured in various stages of talking, gesturing with her right hand to emphasize her points, and shifting her facial expression while maintaining her focus forward. The camera remains stationary, capturing her from the chest up as she engages in a conversation.
